class.name: GKScoreChallenge
class.brief_description: Represents a score-based Game Center challenge.
class.description: Subclass of [GKChallenge] for leaderboard score challenges. It exposes the challenged score, rank, context, and related leaderboard/player metadata.

members.member: Developer-defined context associated with the challenged score.
Leaderboard entry for this challenge on newer Apple platforms. May be [code]null[/code] when unavailable.
Legacy leaderboard identifier for older platform versions.
Player associated with the challenged score entry.
Leaderboard rank of the challenged score.
Numeric score value in this challenge.
